use_cases: Displaying blog posts in a responsive grid layout for content-heavy websites
Serving as a news or article listing section for media and publishing platforms
Providing a content feed section for SaaS product documentation sites
Acting as a portfolio or case study showcase for agency websites
Enabling article preview cards with author, date, and tag metadata for blogs
ai_summary: A blog listing section component featuring a centered heading and description with a responsive grid of post cards. Each card displays title, summary, category label, author, publication date, and tags. Built with Tailwind CSS using a clean, minimalist design suitable for content-driven websites, SaaS blogs, and media platforms.
